sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in his right knee. The patient reports knee pain. The patient reports a limp. The patient reports pain in the left hand.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient is diagnosed with a lateral ligament strain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders a lipid panel. The doctor orders an x-ray. The doctor orders physical therapy. The doctor prescribes meloxicam.
